_comment: Tuneable thresholds for the Complexity Judge. Written by calibration system, read by judge on startup. Edit manually or via calibration acceptance flow.

file_count._doc: Max file count for each score level. Score 0 = ≤value[0], score 1 = ≤value[1], score 2 = ≤value[2], score 3 = >value[2]

domain_spread._doc: Number of architectural layers touched. 0=single, 1=two, 2=three, 3=all layers.

ambiguity._doc: Number of clarifying questions needed. 0=fully specified, 1=1 question, 2=2-3 questions, 3=underspecified.

historical_fail._doc: Prior failures on similar tasks in changelog. 0=none, 1=1 failure, 2=2+ failures, 3=pattern.

tier_token_midpoints._doc: Expected token midpoint per tier. Used for cost estimation and drift analysis.
